last_run_window: Sunday 28 Jun 2026 afternoon + Monday 29 Jun 2026 pre-market

stories.headline: US strikes Iranian sites Saturday; Iran retaliates with drones on Bahrain Sunday — Hormuz military escalation (Strait traffic ~5% of pre-conflict levels)
